subtitle: On-device meeting notes
promotionalText: Record, transcribe and summarise meetings without anything leaving your Mac. Now with a built-in recorder and on-device transcription.
description:
Distavo turns your meetings into clean, structured Markdown notes — entirely on your terms.

Record a meeting with one click (or drop any audio or video file into a watched folder) and Distavo takes it from there: it transcribes the conversation with speaker labels, cleans the transcript, and writes a concise summary with decisions and action points as a Markdown note you can file anywhere.

PRIVATE BY DESIGN
• Transcription runs on-device on Apple Silicon (WhisperKit)
• Summaries come from an Ollama server you control — your own Mac or a machine on your network
• No accounts, no cloud, no telemetry: recordings and notes never leave the machines you choose

BUILT-IN MEETING RECORDER
• Captures the meeting audio playing on your Mac (the other participants) plus your microphone (macOS 14.4+)
• Works with any meeting app — nothing to install in your browser or conferencing tool

A TIDY PIPELINE
• Watches a folder: every new recording becomes a note automatically
• Speaker-labelled transcripts, timestamp-free and readable
• Notes are validated before they are written — no half-finished summaries
• Activity log so you can see exactly what happened and when

FLEXIBLE ENGINES
• Built-in on-device transcription — choose the model that fits your Mac; download and remove models in Settings
• Or point Distavo at your own WhisperX server
• Summaries via your own Ollama server (local or LAN)

Requires macOS 14 or later. On-device transcription needs Apple Silicon; the built-in recorder needs macOS 14.4 or later. Summaries require an Ollama server you run yourself.
